Bind the Generated Control Panel into a Shiny App

Source: R/paintr-app.R
ggpaintr_bind_control_panel.Rd

Register the dynamic var controls and render the standard tabbed control panel into the target uiOutput().

Usage

ggpaintr_bind_control_panel(
  input,
  output,
  paintr_state,
  ids = paintr_state$ids
)

Arguments

input

A Shiny input object.

output

A Shiny output object.

paintr_state

A ggpaintr_state object.

ids

A ggpaintr_ids object describing the top-level Shiny ids used by the integration helpers.

Value

Invisibly returns paintr_state.

On this page
